title: Alpine topography of the Gamburtsev Subglacial Mountains, Antarctica, mapped from ice sheet surface morphology - Data and Code.
author: Lea, Edmund James
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Data and code associated with paper Lea et al. (2024) "Alpine topography of the Gamburtsev Subglacial Mountains, Antarctica, mapped from ice sheet surface morphology." Includes input data and code for automated mapping procedure and validation procedure, as well as automated and manual mapping outputs. Full details within.
